R3-FM-01: use two-column mapping for selected parts versus whole parts
require verbal rehearsal of each quantity before placement
R3-FM-02: label top and bottom positions with meaning roles
sort examples with intentionally swapped counts
use sentence frames pairing each count with its job
R3-FM-03: map oral phrases to cards before writing symbols
use teacher read-aloud and learner write-back routines
reduce symbolic load then rebuild from spoken language
R3-FM-04: require visual justification for each written symbol
connect each symbol to a concrete or diagrammed whole
compare symbols to candidate matching pictures
